Apply edited cell styling to DataTable

Source: R/table_formatting.R
apply_edited_styling.Rd

Apply edited cell styling to DataTable

Usage

apply_edited_styling(dt, data, edited_cells)

Arguments

dt

DataTable object

data

Source dataframe

edited_cells

Dataframe with interaction_id and column_name

Value

DataTable with edited cell styling
